subjects.subject: ap.payment_executed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a single vendor payment is executed as part of a payment run

subjects.subject: ap.payment_run_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a batch of vendor payments is queued for execution

subjects.subject: ap.po_approved
subjects.description: Event emitted when a purchase order is approved for fulfillment

subjects.subject: ap.po_closed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a purchase order is closed (fully received, cancelled, or manually closed)

subjects.subject: ap.po_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a purchase order is created

subjects.subject: ap.po_line_received_linked
subjects.description: Event emitted when a PO line is linked to a goods receipt (3-way match anchor)

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_bill_approved
subjects.description: Event emitted when a vendor bill is approved for payment

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_bill_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a vendor invoice/bill is entered into AP

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_bill_matched
subjects.description: Event emitted when a vendor bill is matched to PO lines (2-way or 3-way match)

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_bill_voided
subjects.description: Compensating event emitted when a vendor bill is voided (reversal)

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new vendor is registered in the AP module

subjects.subject: ap.vendor_updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a vendor's attributes are updated

subjects.subject: ar.events.ar.invoice_opened
subjects.description: Event emitted when an AR invoice is created and issued

subjects.subject: ar.events.ar.payment.applied
subjects.description: Event emitted when a payment is applied to an AR invoice

subjects.subject: ar.events.ar.payment.collection.requested
subjects.description: Event emitted when AR requests payment collection for an invoice

subjects.subject: definition.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new workflow definition is registered

subjects.subject: delegation.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when an actor delegates their workflow authority to another actor

subjects.subject: delegation.revoked
subjects.description: Event emitted when a delegation of workflow authority is revoked

subjects.subject: document.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a controlled document is created

subjects.subject: document.distribution.requested
subjects.description: Event emitted when a released document distribution is requested

subjects.subject: document.distribution.status.updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when document distribution delivery status transitions

subjects.subject: document.released
subjects.description: Event emitted when a controlled document is released from draft to official status

subjects.subject: escalation.fired
subjects.description: Event emitted when an escalation timer fires due to step timeout

subjects.subject: external_ref.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when an external reference mapping is created or upserted

subjects.subject: external_ref.deleted
subjects.description: Event emitted when an external reference mapping is deleted

subjects.subject: external_ref.updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when an external reference mapping is updated

subjects.subject: fx.rate_updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when an FX rate is published or updated

subjects.subject: gl.accrual_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a GL accrual is created and posted

subjects.subject: gl.accrual_reversed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a GL accrual is reversed

subjects.subject: gl.fx_realized_posted
subjects.description: Event emitted when realized FX gain/loss is posted to GL

subjects.subject: gl.fx_revaluation_posted
subjects.description: Event emitted when unrealized FX revaluation is posted to GL

subjects.subject: hold.applied
subjects.description: Event emitted when a hold is applied to an entity

subjects.subject: hold.released
subjects.description: Event emitted when a hold is released from an entity

subjects.subject: instance.advanced
subjects.description: Event emitted when a workflow instance advances to a new step

subjects.subject: instance.cancelled
subjects.description: Event emitted when a workflow instance is cancelled before completion

subjects.subject: instance.completed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a workflow instance reaches its terminal completed state

subjects.subject: instance.started
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new workflow instance is started

subjects.subject: maintenance.meter_reading.recorded
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new meter reading is recorded for an asset

subjects.subject: maintenance.plan.assigned
subjects.description: Event emitted when a maintenance plan is assigned to an asset

subjects.subject: maintenance.plan.due
subjects.description: Event emitted when a maintenance plan assignment becomes due (calendar or meter threshold reached)

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.cancelled
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order is cancelled

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.closed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order is closed (cost locked, no further edits)

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.completed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order is completed. Carries cost data for GL integration.

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order is created

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.overdue
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order's scheduled date has passed without completion

subjects.subject: maintenance.work_order.status_changed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a work order transitions between statuses

subjects.subject: notifications.delivery.failed
subjects.description: Event emitted when notification delivery fails

subjects.subject: notifications.delivery.succeeded
subjects.description: Event emitted when notification delivery succeeds

subjects.subject: number.allocated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a sequential number is allocated for a tenant+entity pair

subjects.subject: number.confirmed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a gap-free reserved number is confirmed by the caller

subjects.subject: party.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new party (company or individual) is created

subjects.subject: party.deactivated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a party is deactivated (soft deleted)

subjects.subject: party.updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a party's base fields are updated

subjects.subject: payments.events.payments.payment.failed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a payment fails

subjects.subject: payments.events.payments.payment.succeeded
subjects.description: Event emitted when a payment succeeds

subjects.subject: payments.events.payments.refund.failed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a refund fails

subjects.subject: payments.events.payments.refund.succeeded
subjects.description: Event emitted when a refund succeeds

subjects.subject: pdf.form.generated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a filled PDF is generated from a submitted form

subjects.subject: pdf.form.submitted
subjects.description: Event emitted when a form submission is validated and finalized

subjects.subject: policy.updated
subjects.description: Event emitted when a numbering policy is created or updated for a tenant+entity pair

subjects.subject: revision.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new revision is added to a controlled document

subjects.subject: step.decision_recorded
subjects.description: Event emitted when an actor records a decision at a parallel routing step

subjects.subject: step.parallel_threshold_met
subjects.description: Event emitted when a parallel step reaches its required decision threshold and auto-advances

subjects.subject: subscriptions.events.subscriptions.billrun.executed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a billing cycle (bill run) is executed

subjects.subject: subscriptions.events.subscriptions.created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new subscription is created

subjects.subject: subscriptions.events.subscriptions.paused
subjects.description: Event emitted when a subscription is paused

subjects.subject: subscriptions.events.subscriptions.resumed
subjects.description: Event emitted when a paused subscription is resumed

subjects.subject: timesheet.approved
subjects.description: Emitted when a reviewer approves a submitted timesheet. Approval locks the period, preventing further entry modifications.

subjects.subject: timesheet.recalled
subjects.description: Emitted when an employee recalls a submitted timesheet before it is reviewed. Transitions status from submitted back to draft.

subjects.subject: timesheet.rejected
subjects.description: Emitted when a reviewer rejects a submitted timesheet. Employee can correct entries and resubmit.

subjects.subject: timesheet.submitted
subjects.description: Emitted when an employee submits a timesheet for a period. Transitions approval status from draft/rejected to submitted.

subjects.subject: timesheet_entry.corrected
subjects.description: Emitted when a timesheet entry is corrected. Append-only: the original row is marked is_current=FALSE and a new correction row is inserted with incremented version.

subjects.subject: timesheet_entry.created
subjects.description: Emitted when a new timesheet entry is created. Follows Guard-Mutation-Outbox atomicity. The entry_id identifies the logical entry; version starts at 1.

subjects.subject: timesheet_entry.voided
subjects.description: Emitted when a timesheet entry is voided (cancelled). A void row with minutes=0 is appended and the previous version is marked is_current=FALSE.

subjects.subject: user.lifecycle.access_review_recorded
subjects.description: Event emitted when an access review decision is recorded for a user

subjects.subject: user.lifecycle.role_assigned
subjects.description: Event emitted when a role is assigned to a user

subjects.subject: user.lifecycle.role_revoked
subjects.description: Event emitted when a role is revoked from a user

subjects.subject: user.lifecycle.user_created
subjects.description: Event emitted when a new user identity is created in the platform

subjects.subject: webhook.received
subjects.description: Event emitted when a raw webhook payload is persisted to the ingest table

subjects.subject: webhook.routed
subjects.description: Event emitted after an inbound webhook has been translated to a domain event
